notes: Phase 01 is the DD-SCR-13 fail-for-right-reason gate per acceptance-tests.md §12: extends ports with GithubPort + TargetKind + GithubError + slice-02 ProbeRefusalReason variants; creates the PURE scraper-domain crate + the EFFECT adapter-github crate; wires the cli scrape github [--sign] dispatch; materializes FakeGithub + fixtures_github bodies; extends xtask check-arch/check-probes; writes tests/fixtures/github/ wiremock stubs (D-D25); and registers all 5 [[test]] targets at once (NOT deferred per-file like slice-03 — register all 5 in 01-05 so the RED gate covers all 34). After this phase all 34 ATs classify RED (panic at todo!()), not BROKEN. Workspace cargo build already passes today (scaffolds self-contained); bootstrap makes the registered test targets reach todo!() RED.

Phase 02 ships the layer-2 (in-memory) scraper-domain @property + example scenarios FIRST (SD-1..SD-6): derive_candidates + load_mapping + mapping_matches_ssot. These unblock the layer-3 candidate-rendering (SC-*) and harvest (SG-*) phases — the CLI renders the already-proven pure derivation.

Phase 03 (scrape_github) ships SG-1..9: resolve target, public-data banner, harvest repo/user signals, public-only refusal, not-found, offline, persist-nothing. SG-1 is the slice-02 walking skeleton (scrape->propose half; the sign half is SS-1). SG-5 is the scraper_only_reads_public_data release-gate (KPI-SCR-4). SG-1/8/9 drive scraper_never_persists_unsigned (KPI-SCR-2).

Phase 04 ships SC-1..5 (candidate rendering + auditability; SC-1 candidate_names_source_signal release-gate KPI-SCR-3; SC-3 candidate_confidence_no_autoinflate proposal half) + SA-1..5 (optional PAT, rate limits, token-never-leaks; WD-63).

Phase 05 ships SS-1..9 (review->edit->sign via the slice-01 pipeline; batch --sign N,N,...). SS-1 is the walking-skeleton sign half + scraper_reuses_slice01_publish_path release-gate (I-SCR-6); SS-2 is candidate_confidence_no_autoinflate sign half (KPI-SCR-2 release-gate); SS-3 is provenance display-only / CID stability (WD-62/I-SCR-7).

Sizing: 39 steps for 34 ATs (5 bootstrap + 34 one-per-scenario) = 1.15 steps/AT. No scenario step is combined this slice — all 34 are 1:1 with a step (the 5-bootstrap front-load absorbs the per-file [[test]] registration that slice-03 spread out). Combined steps would be permitted (<=3 scenarios sharing files_to_modify + notes) but the 1:1 mapping is cleaner here and keeps each integration gate isolated.

DD-SCR-10 state-delta migration: load-bearing human-gate scenarios (SG-1, SG-8, SG-9) carry an implementation_notes call-out to migrate assert_no_claim_persisted from the named-helper form to assert_state_delta(before, after, universe, expected) — universe {author_claims.row_count, pds.records.len, claims_dir.artifact_count} all set_to("0"), modeled on slice-03's assert_purge_state_delta. The Rust state_delta port at tests/common/state_delta.rs was bootstrapped by slice-01; slice-02 INHERITS it.
